title: Sable: Collision damage  (Create Aeronautics)
description: Adds damage to objects from the Sable engine
body:
**Sable Collision Damage adds impact-based damage for Sable sub-level structures, aimed especially at Create: Aeronautics ships.**

When a physics structure hits the world (or another structure) hard enough, blocks can break from the collision, turning crashes into real consequences instead of a harmless bump. This is useful if you want:

More believable ship physics and “landing mistakes matter” gameplay
Ship-to-ship ramming and accidents to have visible results
A lightweight way to add danger to Sable-powered contraptions without changing the rest of your modpack

Config (in sablecollisiondamage-common.toml):

1. minBreakSpeed: minimum collision speed required to start breaking blocks

1. staticSlowdownPerBlock: additional slowdown applied per broken block (helps prevent chain-reaction destruction)



**Demonstration**:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pRTfMe4_vxg" title="Проигрыватель YouTube" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



Compatibility note: the mod is designed to coexist with Sable’s own special block behaviors (for example, TNT keeps its original handling).

[Similar to this mod, but Valkyrien skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/vs-collision-damage)



This is an alpha version, and only a small part has been implemented.
